generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.org/dtdf"
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"

instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor"
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on motor",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque sensor for measuring torque (τ)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulationOutputSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Virtual sensor for simulated outputs from dynamics models",
    DTDFVocab:producedData r_M_DataTransmitted, r_G_DataTransmitted, r_out_DataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

instance r_M_DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulationOutputSensor
]

instance r_G_DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulationOutputSensor
]

instance r_out_DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulationOutputSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTStreamingEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTStreamingEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTStreamingEnabler
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor angular velocity (ω)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTStreamingEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox angular velocity",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTStreamingEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTStreamingEnabler
]

instance r_M_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output r_M",
    DTDFVocab:fromData r_M_DataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance r_G_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output r_G",
    DTDFVocab:fromData r_G_DataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance r_out_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output r_out",
    DTDFVocab:fromData r_out_DataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance JointFrictionRelationshipInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into physical relationships of joint friction"
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control algorithms for improved motion accuracy based on friction model identification",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models",
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionRelationshipInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a dashboard for understanding physical relationships and improving robot motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionRelationshipInsight, AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data linking",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model implemented in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model implemented in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model implemented in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model implemented in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DataCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation models for processing sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot",
    base:contains MotorComponent, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements during robot operation for continuous friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot axis with sensor data via MQTT, SysML-based structural model, Simulink simulation models, Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for traceability, and unified dashboard for visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, covering real-time wear and operational changes during robot use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated by comparing simulated data (from Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre models) against measured data to detect deviations and improve friction model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming between physical robot and digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) per Industrie 4.0 standards, SysML for system modeling as per industry standards."
]
